case_title: ABRANTES FRANCISCO A VS AUGUSTO ANTONIO AKA CARVALHO DE FARIA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ABRANTES FRANCISCO A AS TO DEFENDANT AUGUSTO ANTONIO AKA CARVALHO DE FARIA BETTENCOURT ANTONIO S SILVEIRA MANUELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CERTIFIED LETTER TO AUGUSTO ANTONIO RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-16-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF NOV-12-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BETTENCOURT ANTONIO S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABRANTES FRANCISCO A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BETTENCOURT ANTONIO S $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,028.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGEMENT CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO J.SAWA.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BETTENCOURT ANTONIO S JUDGMENT OF 12/16/91 VACATED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
